parameters.command: cd /home/mystic/jarvis && git fetch origin 2>&1 && BEHIND=$(git rev-list HEAD..origin/main --count 2>/dev/null) && echo "Behind by $BEHIND" && if [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then git pull origin main 2>&1; else echo 'Up to date'; fi
cd /home/mystic/jarvis && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "auto: nightly sync $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" && git push origin main)
